data.name: Err_ClaimNotFound
data.value: Claim not found
data.comment: HTTP 404 error title when claim does not exist

data.name: Err_ClaimNotFoundDetail
data.value: The requested claim could not be found.
data.comment: HTTP 404 error detail message

data.name: Err_AuthenticationRequired
data.value: Authentication required
data.comment: HTTP 401 error title when user is not authenticated

data.name: Err_AuthenticationRequiredDetail
data.value: The current request does not have a valid authenticated user.
data.comment: HTTP 401 error detail message

data.name: Err_ConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict
data.comment: HTTP 409 error title when concurrent modification detected

data.name: Err_ConcurrencyConflictDetail
data.value: The claim has been modified by another user. Please reload the claim and try again.
data.comment: HTTP 409 error detail message for concurrent modification

data.name: Err_ClaimCreationConflict
data.value: Claim creation conflict
data.comment: HTTP 409 error title when claim number cannot be reserved

data.name: Err_ClaimCreationConflictDetail
data.value: The claim number could not be reserved. Please retry the request.
data.comment: HTTP 409 error detail message for claim creation

data.name: Err_InvalidWorkflowTransition
data.value: Invalid workflow transition
data.comment: HTTP 409 error title when workflow state change is invalid

data.name: Err_RetryNotAllowed
data.value: Retry not allowed
data.comment: HTTP 409 error title when notification retry is not eligible

data.name: Err_RetryNotAllowedDetail
data.value: Cannot retry a notification in '{0}' state. Only failed notifications can be retried.
data.comment: HTTP 409 error detail message for notification retry eligibility. {0} is the communication status

data.name: Err_NotificationNotFound
data.value: Notification not found
data.comment: HTTP 404 error title when notification does not exist

data.name: Err_NotificationNotFoundDetail
data.value: The requested notification could not be found for this claim.
data.comment: HTTP 404 error detail message for notification

data.name: Audit_ClaimCreated
data.value: Claim file created with claimant, claim, and loss information.
data.comment: Audit message when claim is initially created

data.name: Audit_ClaimReviewedNoChanges
data.value: Claim file reviewed with no material changes.
data.comment: Audit message when claim is updated but no changes detected

data.name: Audit_PolicySyncFailed
data.value: Policy data synchronization failed: {0}
data.comment: Audit message when policy sync fails. {0} is the failure reason

data.name: Audit_PaymentSyncFailed
data.value: Payment data synchronization failed: {0}
data.comment: Audit message when payment sync fails. {0} is the failure reason

data.name: Audit_DocumentSyncFailed
data.value: Document data synchronization failed: {0}
data.comment: Audit message when document sync fails. {0} is the failure reason

data.name: Audit_InitialPolicySyncFailed
data.value: Initial policy data sync failed: {0}
data.comment: Audit message for initial policy sync failure during claim creation. {0} is the failure reason

data.name: Audit_InitialPaymentSyncFailed
data.value: Initial payment data sync failed: {0}
data.comment: Audit message for initial payment sync failure during claim creation. {0} is the failure reason

data.name: Audit_NoteAdded
data.value: Claim note added: '{0}'.
data.comment: Audit message when note is added. {0} is preview of note content

data.name: Audit_DocumentUploaded
data.value: Document uploaded: {0} ({1}).
data.comment: Audit message when document is uploaded. {0} is filename, {1} is file type

data.name: Audit_WorkflowAdvanced
data.value: Claim workflow advanced.
data.comment: Audit message when claim workflow progresses to next stage

data.name: Audit_RoutedForApproval
data.value: Claim routed for payment approval. Rationale: {0}
data.comment: Audit message when claim is routed for approval. {0} is the rationale/reason

data.name: Audit_NotificationSent
data.value: Outbound {0} notification sent via {1} to {2}. Delivery ID: {3}.
data.comment: Audit message when notification sent successfully. {0}=type, {1}=channel, {2}=recipient, {3}=delivery ID

data.name: Audit_NotificationFailed
data.value: Outbound {0} notification failed via {1} to {2}. Reason: {3}
data.comment: Audit message when notification delivery fails. {0}=type, {1}=channel, {2}=recipient, {3}=failure reason

data.name: Audit_NotificationRetrySucceeded
data.value: Retry of {0} notification succeeded via {1} to {2}. Delivery ID: {3}.
data.comment: Audit message when notification retry succeeds. {0}=type, {1}=channel, {2}=recipient, {3}=delivery ID

data.name: Audit_NotificationRetryFailed
data.value: Retry of {0} notification failed via {1} to {2}. Reason: {3}
data.comment: Audit message when notification retry fails. {0}=type, {1}=channel, {2}=recipient, {3}=failure reason

data.name: Audit_ReconciliationRetried
data.value: Reconciliation retried {0}.
data.comment: Audit message first line in reconciliation summary. {0} is comma-separated list of retried dependencies

data.name: Audit_ReconciliationNoRecovery
data.value: No previously unresolved dependencies were recovered during this attempt.
data.comment: Audit message when reconciliation finds no recovered dependencies

data.name: Audit_ReconciliationRecovered
data.value: Recovered: {0}.
data.comment: Audit message for recovered dependencies in reconciliation. {0} is comma-separated list of recovered dependencies

data.name: Audit_ReconciliationAllResolved
data.value: All claim integration dependencies are now aligned.
data.comment: Audit message when all dependencies are resolved after reconciliation

data.name: Audit_ReconciliationStillUnresolved
data.value: Still unresolved: {0}.
data.comment: Audit message for still-unresolved dependencies. {0} is comma-separated list of unresolved dependencies

data.name: Sync_PolicySystemError
data.value: Policy system was unreachable or returned an unexpected error: {0}
data.comment: Error message when policy system fails. {0} is truncated exception message

data.name: Sync_PaymentSystemError
data.value: Payment system was unreachable or returned an unexpected error: {0}
data.comment: Error message when payment system fails. {0} is truncated exception message

data.name: Sync_PolicyNotFound
data.value: Policy not found for the recorded policy number.
data.comment: Error message when policy lookup returns no results

data.name: Sync_MessagingClientError
data.value: Messaging client threw an unexpected error: {0}
data.comment: Error message when messaging system fails. {0} is exception message

data.name: Sync_DeliveryFailedNoReason
data.value: Delivery failed without a reason.
data.comment: Fallback error message when delivery fails with no specific reason provided
